settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize your experience, language preferences, and privacy controls.

home.heading: Measure pollution and health impact
home.description: Switch to better product choices and keep families, shops and cities thriving.

landing.heading: Turn everyday receipts into greener choices.
landing.description: EcoLife Receipt AI helps families, shopkeepers, and city planners understand the environmental and health impact of everyday purchases through intelligent insights and voice-assisted guidance.
features: Receipt upload and manual bill entry
Multi-role dashboards and eco voice assistant

voicePage.title: Voice Assistant
voicePage.description: Voice-guided eco insights in your chosen language.
voicePage.hint: Speak or tap the microphone to start.

receipt.title: Premium receipt analysis experience
receipt.description: A clean, reusable interface built with Tailwind CSS, Heroicons, React hooks, responsive grids, and motion placeholders.

scanner.heading: Scan Your Shopping Receipt
scanner.description: Upload your shopping receipt to understand its environmental and health impact with instant, premium insights.

city.title: City Impact Simulator
city.description: See how a greener shopping behavior shift can create measurable change at neighborhood and city scale.

voice.heading: EcoVoice AI
voice.description: Use your voice to guide the receipt analysis experience.
voice.unsupported: Speech Recognition is not supported in this browser. This demo uses a placeholder experience.
voice.unsupportedSpeech: Speech Synthesis is not supported in this browser.

voiceSummary.title: EcoVoice Summary
voiceSummary.heading: Read your report aloud
voiceSummary.reportReady: Your receipt impact report is ready. Your basket has strong opportunities to reduce emissions and improve health.
voiceSummary.lowerImpact: Your report highlights lower-impact choices and healthier alternatives for your basket.
voiceSummary.tamilReport: உங்கள் ரசீதின் தாக்கம் தயாராக உள்ளது. உங்கள் வாங்குதல்களில் கார்பன் குறைக்க பல வாய்ப்புகள் உள்ளன.

voiceBasket.title: EcoVoice Basket Assistant
voiceBasket.heading: Guide your better basket aloud
voiceBasket.basketReady: Your better basket is ready. It reduces carbon, improves health, and lowers waste.
voiceBasket.swapsEnglish: Here are the main swaps. Replace plastic bottles, soft drinks, and imported produce with reusable and local choices.
voiceBasket.swapsTamil: இந்த மாற்றங்கள் உங்கள் வாங்குதலை கார்பனைக் குறைத்து, ஆரோக்கியத்தையும் மேம்படுத்தும்.

uploader.title: Receipt Uploader
uploader.heading: Upload a receipt or preview a sample
uploader.previewPlaceholder: Click the button to explore a sample receipt before analysis.
